content: 1. Database reliability - indexes, validation, integrity checks
2. Canonical API response layer - strengthen Pydantic models
3. Route guards and fallbacks - 404, unauthorized, loading/empty states
4. Session and auth hardening - timeout, logout, deep link protection
5. Event logging backbone - audit trail for all actions
6. Manager action model foundation - action states and persistence
7. Deployment readiness - env vars, build reproducibility
8. GitHub hygiene - README, checklists, architecture docs
9. Final consistency test matrix - verify all canonical data
10. Build and verification pass - run all tests and document
